name: FortiWeb Signature — Path Traversal Baseline
objective: Detect and block common path traversal payloads in URI, query string, and encoded parameter variants using a FortiWeb baseline signature profile.
risk_mitigated: Directory traversal attempts that target sensitive files, templates, or internal application paths.
potential_side_effects: File-management and content export endpoints may need exclusions when legitimate relative path patterns are expected.
tuning_notes: Focus initial rollout on public routes and administrative file access paths. Exclude internal-only upload handlers or packaged content paths after validation.
deployment_notes: Import into a staging FortiWeb policy package first and review attack logs before enabling production enforcement.
monitoring_notes: Watch for repeated ../, ..%2f, and encoded backslash variants by source IP and user-agent. Rising match volume often correlates with opportunistic scanning.
